name: FUTURE BUILDINGS WAS HACKED MORE THAN 150GB SENSETIVE DATA LEAKED
message: Who is Future Buildings  Future Buildings is a family owned and operated company that takes pride in providing customers with steel buildings  Home Improvement & Hardware Retail · Canada · 132 Employees   Headquarters: 1405 Denison St, Markham, Ontario, L3R 5V2, Canada Phone Number: (800) 668-5111 Revenue: $27.2M Linkedin: http://www.linkedin.com/company/future-buildings Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/futuresteelbuildings Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/futuresteel
